SlatePlayerID.description: Unique ID of a SlatePlayer (assigned by SportsDataIO)

SlateID.description: The SlateID that this SlatePlayer refers to

SlateGameID.description: The SlateGameID that this SlatePlayer refers to

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

PlayerGameProjectionStatID.description: The SportsDataIO StatID that this SlatePlayer refers to. This points to data in the respective sports' projected player game stats feeds.

OperatorPlayerID.description: Unique ID of the Player (assigned by the operator)

OperatorSlatePlayerID.description: Unique ID of the SlatePlayer (assigned by the operator)

OperatorPlayerName.description: The player's name (assigned by the operator)

OperatorPosition.description: The player's eligible positions for the contest (assigned by the operator)

OperatorSalary.description: The player's salary for the contest (assigned by the operator)

OperatorRosterSlots.description: The player's eligible positions to be played in the contest (assigned by the operator).  Note: this would include UTIL; etc plays for those that are eligible.

RemovedByOperator.description: Indicates whether this player was removed/deleted by the operator

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO
